Amendments2006—Subsec. (c)(2)(B). inserted before period at end “, including preparing an analysis of such services, projects, and programs, and of how the evaluation relates to improvements in such services, projects, and programs and in the strategic plan of the Administration”.Pub. L. 109–365

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Assistant Secretary shall be responsible for the administration, implementation, and making of grants and contracts under this subchapter and shall not delegate authority under this subchapter to any other individual, agency, or organization.

children.label: A
children.text: for which funds were provided under this subchapter; and

children.label: B
children.text: that was completed in the fiscal year for which such report is prepared.

children.label: A
children.text: the name or descriptive title of each project or program;

children.label: B
children.text: the name and address of the individual or governmental entity that conducted such project or program;

children.label: C
children.text: a specification of the period throughout which such project or program was conducted;

children.label: D
children.text: the identity of each source of funds expended to carry out such project or program and the amount of funds provided by each such source;

children.label: E
children.text: an abstract describing the nature and operation of such project or program; and

children.label: F
children.text: a bibliography identifying all published information relating to such project or program.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Assistant Secretary shall establish by regulation and implement a process to evaluate the results of projects and programs carried out under this subchapter.

children.label: A
children.text: make available to the public the results of each evaluation carried out under paragraph (1); and

children.label: B
children.text: use such evaluation to improve services delivered, or the operation of projects and programs carried out, under this chapter, including preparing an analysis of such services, projects, and programs, and of how the evaluation relates to improvements in such services, projects, and programs and in the strategic plan of the Administration.
